patches.find: E-PRED-A, C, and D have been folded without WITHDRAWN notation into the dome’s restructured Tier 1/2/3 κ-coupling protocol. We examine all four registered sub-tests
patches.replace: E-PRED-A, C, and D have been folded without WITHDRAWN notation into the dome’s restructured Tier 1/2/3 κ-coupling protocol. Most consequentially, E-PRED-C inverted between snapshots — the 2026-03-12 page predicted SG gravimeters would read 0.0 µGal during the eclipse; the 2026-05-07 live page replaces it with PRED-TIER-3’s positive 10–13 µGal pulse for the same instrument class at the same August 2026 eclipse (see WIN-014 for the resulting self-contradiction analysis). We examine all four registered sub-tests
patches.rationale: Mirror the E-PRED-C inversion sentence from SEC-8b.3 L3a (EXP-292) into SEC-4.2.4 opening paragraph. The main eclipse discussion section is more discoverable than the response-to-critics tab; readers need the strongest framing — that the dome's own PRED-TIER-3 protocol now directly contradicts the registered E-PRED-C prediction — in SEC-4.2.4, not just SEC-8b.3. Cross-page parity required.

patches.find: The dome registers four "model-discriminating" sub-tests (E-PRED-A through D).
patches.replace: The dome’s 2026-03-12 snapshot registered four “model-discriminating” sub-tests (E-PRED-A through D).
patches.rationale: TLDR present-tense 'registers' conflicts with body's snapshot-anchored 'registered'. Update TLDR to match body framing: the four E-PRED labels were registered in the 2026-03-12 snapshot, not ongoing.
